---
title: "excel to rds"
author: "Joy O'Brien"
date: "2024-11-18"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Load a tab-separated file
data <- read.delim("~/Desktop/seqtab_orig_final.txt", header = TRUE, sep = "\t")
#data <- read_excel("~/Desktop/seqtab_orig_final_renamedv2.xlsx", sheet = "seqtab_orig_final")

# Rename the columns to get rid of the X
colnames(data) <- gsub("^X", "", colnames(data))

# View the data
head(data)

# Checking to see what type of object it is -- should be matrix
#st1 <- readRDS("~/Desktop/seqtab_orig_final_renamed.rds")
#class(st1) # data.frame


# Convert to matrix  
data_mat <- as.matrix(data)

# Check for negative values in st1
any(data_mat < 0) # TRUE if negative values exist
which(data_mat < 0, arr.ind = TRUE) # Location of negative values

# Save the data as an .rds file
saveRDS(data_mat, "~/Desktop/seqtab_orig_final_renamedv2_txt.rds")

```
